nodes.name: Document Upload Trigger
nodes.notes: Triggered when a file is uploaded via WhatsApp or Web. Expects multipart/form-data with webhookId field and a file attachment.

nodes.name: Fetch Client Extraction Rules
nodes.notes: Pulls the client's extraction rules and output schema from the database.

parameters.text: Extract all relevant information from the attached document based on your system instructions. Use the readDocument tool to access the file content.

parameters.description: Use this tool to read the uploaded document file from the webhook trigger.
